Class ClanInviteService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.service.ClanInviteService
public class ClanInviteService extends Object
Manages pending clan invites in memory. Invites are never persisted to the database; they expire after a configurable duration and are lost on restart.

A player may hold multiple pending invites from different clans simultaneously.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClanInviteService

      public ClanInviteService(long expirySeconds)
      Parameters:
      expirySeconds - how long an invite remains valid after it is sent

  • Method Details

    • setExpirySeconds

      public void setExpirySeconds(long expirySeconds)
      Updates how long new invites stay valid. Called after a config reload. Invites already pending keep the expiry they were created with.
      Parameters:
      expirySeconds - the new expiry duration in seconds

    • addInvite

      public boolean addInvite(UUID clanId, String clanName, UUID inviterUuid, UUID inviteeUuid)
      Creates a pending invite for the given player from the given clan. Any existing expired invites for this player are pruned first. A player may not receive a second invite from the same clan while one is active.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the inviting clan's UUID
      clanName - the inviting clan's display name, stored for accept/decline lookup
      inviterUuid - the UUID of the member who sent the invite
      inviteeUuid - the UUID of the player being invited
      Returns:
      false if an active invite from this clan already exists

    • getPendingInvites

      public List<ClanInviteService.PendingInvite> getPendingInvites(UUID inviteeUuid)
      Returns all non-expired pending invites for a player.
      Parameters:
      inviteeUuid - the invited player's UUID
      Returns:
      a snapshot list of active invites; empty if none exist

    • consumeInvite

      public Optional<ClanInviteService.PendingInvite> consumeInvite(UUID inviteeUuid, String clanName)
      Finds and removes an active invite by clan name (case-insensitive). Returns empty if the invite does not exist or has expired.
      Parameters:
      inviteeUuid - the invited player's UUID
      clanName - the clan name to accept or decline
      Returns:
      the matching invite, or empty

    • clearInvites

      public void clearInvites(UUID inviteeUuid)
      Removes all invites for a player. Called when a player joins a clan.
